code: import axios from'axios';const api=axios.create({baseURL:'/api'});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const stored=localStorage.getItem('examportal_user');if(stored){const{token}=JSON.parse(stored);if(token)config.headers.Authorization='Bearer '+token;}return config;});api.interceptors.response.use(res=>res,err=>{var _err$response;if(((_err$response=err.response)===null||_err$response===void 0?void 0:_err$response.status)===401){localStorage.removeItem('examportal_user');window.location.href='/login';}return Promise.reject(err);});export default api;
